# Alpha Book — Reading Digest

## ch-1
HRV introduction · autonomic balance signal · resting baseline distinguishes overtraining from peak.

## ch-3
Training-load dosing · acute:chronic ratio · sleep architecture interacts with training adaptation.

## ch-5
Recovery markers · subjective wellness scores · objective HRV trends reinforce or contradict the subjective signal.
